commands.repair_reason: Contributor must add real behavior proof for the external isolated cron announce path; there is no narrow repair task for automation.; Cleared: The diff only reuses existing local cron session-key helpers and adds a focused test; no supply-chain, secret, permission, or third-party code execution concern was found. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes isolated cron direct announce delivery to use the stable cron notification session key and adds a regression test for that session-context choice.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. The source path is reproducible by inspection: isolated runs force a fresh session while current main builds outbound context from params.agentSessionKey, unlike the stable notification helper path.
commands.review_followup: Contributor must add real behavior proof for the external isolated cron announce path; there is no narrow repair task for automation.
